title: Build and charge a walk-in order
description: A vendor can add menu items to the POS cart, choose a payment method, and charge a walk-in order.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Navigate to #/pos
Add a product to the cart
Choose a payment method
Charge the order
Verify the cart clears after the order is charged
Verify the new walk-in order is reflected in the ordering views

title: Approved vendor can sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that an approved vendor can authenticate with valid credentials and land on the operations dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the vendor analytics summary is displayed

title: Complete an order through the full lifecycle
description: A vendor can move an active order from taken cash to ready, picked up, and completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the orders view link
Take cash for an active order
Mark the order ready
Mark the order as picked up
Complete the order
Verify the order appears in the completed state

title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: An approved vendor can sign in and land on the dashboard with the main operations views available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the live queue and performance summary are displayed

title: Create a walk-in order from POS
description: A vendor can build a walk-in cart in POS and charge it so the order appears in the ordering workflow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the POS view link
Add a product to the cart
Select cash payment
Charge the order
Verify the new walk-in order appears in the orders workflow

title: Vendor can create a walk-in order from the POS
description: This verifies that a signed-in vendor can build a cart from the live menu and place a walk-in order from the POS.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the POS navigation link
Add an item from the live menu to the cart
Charge the walk-in order
Verify a walk-in order confirmation is visible
Verify the order appears in the live order or queue view

title: Manage an order through completion
description: A vendor can move an active order through cash confirmation, ready, picked up, and complete states on the orders board.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Navigate to #/orders
Select an active order
Confirm offline payment for the order
Mark the order as ready
Mark the order as picked up
Complete the order
Verify the order moves out of the active list
Verify the completed state is displayed

title: Vendor can manage an active order through completion
description: This verifies that a signed-in vendor can advance an active order through the normal lifecycle and complete it from the orders board.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the orders board navigation link
Select an active order
Mark the order as ready
Mark the order as picked up
Complete the order
Verify the order is shown as completed
Verify the active order remains on the completed tab

title: Toggle the stall open or closed
description: An approved vendor can change whether the stall is accepting orders from the dashboard header.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the dashboard view link
Toggle the register state
Verify the stall accepting-orders status changes

title: Signed-in vendor can open and close the stall from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a logged-in vendor can toggle stall status from the dashboard and see the status update reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Toggle the stall status control to open the stall
Toggle the stall status control to close the stall
Verify the stall status is shown as closed
Verify the stall status control is visible

title: Open the dashboard after sign in
description: An approved vendor can sign in and land on the dashboard with analytics and live queue content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Verify dashboard analytics are displayed
Verify the live queue panel is displayed

description: A vendor can open the queue view and see queued orders displayed when orders are waiting for pickup.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the queue view link

title: Sign in after application approval
description: An approved vendor applicant can sign in later and reach the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the vendor session is active

title: Add a menu item
description: A vendor can create a new menu item and see it appear in the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the inventory view link
Start adding a new menu item
Fill in the item name field with Test Paneer Wrap
Fill in the item price field with a valid price
Fill in the preparation time field with a valid preparation time
Set the item as available
Save the new item
Verify the new menu item appears in the inventory list

title: Vendor can maintain menu items in inventory
description: This verifies that a signed-in vendor can add, edit, delete, filter, and toggle availability for menu items from inventory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the inventory navigation link
Add a new inventory item
Edit the newly added item
Toggle the item availability
Delete the item
Verify the inventory list is displayed
Verify the item management changes are reflected in the list

title: Review daily analytics and live activity
description: A signed-in vendor can review revenue, orders today, the hourly chart, the live queue, and recent transactions on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Verify today's revenue and order count are displayed
Verify the hourly performance chart, live queue, and recent transactions are displayed

title: Add, edit, and delete an inventory item
description: A vendor can maintain the menu by creating an item, updating it, and deleting it from inventory.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Navigate to #/inventory
Add a new inventory item
Edit the newly created inventory item
Delete the newly created inventory item
Verify the inventory list updates after creation and editing
Verify the inventory item is removed after deletion

title: Browse orders with tabs and pagination
description: A vendor can switch between order tabs and page through the orders board.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the orders view link
Switch to the completed orders tab
Go to the next orders page
Go back to the previous orders page
Verify the orders list updates for the selected tab and page

title: Vendor can review live queue and analytics on the dashboard
description: This verifies that a signed-in vendor can view the dashboard analytics and live queue content used to monitor daily operations.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the revenue and orders today metrics are displayed
Verify the live queue panel is displayed

title: Edit a menu item
description: A vendor can update an existing menu item and see the saved changes in the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the inventory view link
Select an existing menu item
Start editing the selected item
Fill in the item name field with Updated Test Item
Fill in the item price field with a valid price
Save the item changes
Verify the updated item appears in the inventory list

title: Delete a menu item
description: A vendor can delete a menu item and see it removed from the inventory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the inventory view link
Select an existing menu item
Delete the selected item
Verify the deleted item is removed from the inventory list

title: Switch between order board tabs and pages
description: A vendor can move between board tabs and paginate through orders to review different sets of orders.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Navigate to #/orders
Switch to the active orders tab
Switch to the completed orders tab
Go to the next page of orders
Go back to the previous page of orders
Verify the selected board tab changes the visible order set
Verify pagination updates the order list

title: Vendor can log out from a protected view
description: This verifies that a signed-in vendor can end the session from a protected screen and return to the login gate.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the account menu to sign out
Verify the vendor sign-in screen is displayed
Verify the protected dashboard is no longer displayed

title: Log out from a protected view
description: A signed-in vendor can log out from a protected page and return to the authentication gate.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Click the dashboard view link
Log out

Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form

Switch to the vendor application form
Fill in the stall name field with Test Stall
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor application form
Verify a pending confirmation is visible

title: Vendor can reject an active order after confirming the action
description: This verifies that a signed-in vendor can reject an order from the board and see it removed from the active flow after confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password input with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Click the orders board navigation link
Select an active order
Reject the order and confirm the action
Verify the order is shown as rejected
Verify the order no longer appears in the active orders view

title: Filter products and manage cart quantities
description: A vendor can narrow the POS menu by category and adjust cart quantities before charging.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Navigate to #/pos
Select a menu category filter
Add a product to the cart
Increase the item quantity in the cart
Decrease the item quantity in the cart
Verify the cart quantity updates correctly
Verify the filtered product view remains available

title: Reject an order after opening the rejection flow

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the vendor sign in phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the vendor sign in password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the vendor sign in form
Navigate to #/orders
Select an active order
Open the reject order flow
Confirm the rejection
Verify the order is marked rejected
Verify the order is removed from the active list

title: Vendor sees an error when sign in fails
description: This verifies that invalid sign-in details keep the vendor on the login screen and show a visible error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone input with an invalid phone number
Fill in the password input with an invalid password
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an error message is visible
Verify the sign-in screen remains visible
